title: KAAD-046 Keiko Akiyoshi, a beautiful mother-in-law of my home
description: I want my daughter to be happy. With that intent, Keiko was trying to get along with her daughter-in-law, who had a constant quarrel. It's no wonder that I'm decisively tearing the relationship between my daughter and her husband ... When Keiko visited her daughter's couple's house to set up a place for discussion, Keiko was struck by her son-in-law at night. At that time, I should have scolded my breath and told him to take good care of my daughter. However, Keiko's body feels like a forcible caress ...
